# RathCoWork

> AI assistant for Thai government officials — draft documents, summarize meetings, and automate routine tasks securely.

RathCoWork helps public-sector staff run AI-powered templates for common tasks: meeting summaries, official letters, citizen replies, budget analysis, and legal research. All runs are auditable, with row-level access control and in-country data storage.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of RathCoWork and quick access to templates.
- [Sign in](/login): Sign in or create an account to start using RathCoWork.
